title: pharnaceum aurantium
intro: Pharnaceum aurantium, also known as bitter orange or Seville orange, is a small evergreen tree or shrub that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The medicinal properties of Pharnaceum aurantium include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Pharnaceum aurantium include its use in weight loss, improving circulation, and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Pharnaceum aurantium include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
